query: faded polaroid old photograph yellowed vintage snapshot
message: sub:analog_degradation/faded_polaroid — anti_aesthetic — sepia, yellowing, faded snapshots, browned old photos

response.objective_caption: A photographic print rests at an angle on a dark surface. The print depicts a woman standing outdoors on a lawn in front of a white picket fence and a house with a window and chimney. She wears a sleeveless light-colored dress and is positioned among several children, including a toddler in a patterned outfit to her left, a child in a white dress in the foreground, and a small child seated on the grass to the right. Trees and bushes appear in the background, and the edges of the print are scalloped.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A faded, sepia-toned vintage photographic print with muted, low-vibrancy tones and a retro monotone palette rests at an angle on a dark surface. The photograph shows a smiling woman in a light-colored dress standing on a grassy lawn in front of a white picket fence and house, accompanied by several children—including a toddler in a patterned outfit, a child in a white dress in the foreground, and a small child sitting on the grass. The aged print has scalloped edges, and its dull, washed-out warmth conveys a sense of nostalgia and melancholy.
